sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἑταῖρος

- Transliteration: hetairos

- Phonetic: het-ah'-ee-ros

- Definition:

1. a comrade, mate, partner

2. in kindly address

a. friend, (my good friend)

- Origin: from etes (a clansman)

- TDNT entry: 13:39,3

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From ἔτης etē s (a clansman); a comrade: - fellow friend.
